ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall quality is good, but could be more natural in tone to match the persona of a strict and fair gatekeeper who might not use overly formal language.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Good overall response maintains consistency with no context, but lacks immediate relevance to the current situation and could be perceived as slightly impersonal by a suspicious gatekeeper.
